content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — App schedules automated hourly repeating push notifications (App/NotificationScheduler.swift: `scheduleHourlyDeals`, `repeats: true`, 3600s interval) and metadata explicitly advertises "EVERY HOUR... unlimited notifications, all day long" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt), matching the exact spam-push pattern Apple flags.
Pierre: Apple's 4.5.4 explicitly prohibits push notifications used for promotional/marketing spam not explicitly requested per-instance by the user, and this scheduler auto-fires hourly promo content regardless of individual user opt-in per alert. The marketing copy makes the intent explicit, which will almost certainly trigger a rejection or review question. Fix by making notifications user-configurable (frequency/opt-in per deal type) and rewriting the description to avoid promising blanket hourly spam.
